summary: Full frontend testing of TZOUL BARBER Admin Panel. All 9 test scenarios passed successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminDashboard.jsx is 1024 lines — consider splitting into separate tab component files for maintainability
useEffect dependency arrays use eslint-disable comments — minor tech debt
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully rebuilt as standalone routes (/admin, /admin/dashboard). All 7 nav items (overview, bookings, daily/Today, services, barbers, schedules/Availability, instagram) present with data-testid attributes. Login with admin@tzoulbarber.com/admin123 works. Split-panel design confirmed. No site nav visible on admin routes.
